# Struktur Kurikulum {#sec-curricula}

{{< include _a_profile.qmd >}}

{{< include _b_competency.qmd >}}

{{< include _c_material.qmd >}}

{{< include _d_course.qmd >}}

{{< include _e_scoring.qmd >}}

{{< include _f_syllabus.qmd >}}

{{< include _g_policies.qmd >}}

{{< include _h_judiciary.qmd >}}
